g4_revenue_trend.description: Strong growth driven by iPhone ecosystem

g7_moat.description: iPhone ecosystem: App Store, iMessage, AirDrop, iCloud, Apple Watch integration create switching costs estimated at $1,000+ per customer. 1B+ active devices. Services revenue growing rapidly. Consumer brand among most trusted globally.

control_groups.conclusion: BUY — also passes. Buffett chose Apple due to consumer product understandability. Both are correct choices.
PASS — earnings yield ~5%, just below threshold

buffett_action: Started buying in Q1 2016, peaked at $17.7B position
actual_result: Historic win — largest position in Berkshire portfolio, 10x+ return
key_insight: All 7 gates passed with wide margin. Microsoft also passes — framework correctly identifies the quality tier, final selection comes from circle of competence (Buffett understood iPhone as consumer product, not as tech company).
